ops.text: cc-present 0.10.0 host UI, observed during getaway pack v2 live QA (2026-07-18): (1) on a board with 5 focus steps and 7 blocks, the focus-deck header reads "Step 1 / 5" while the jump-dots read "Item 1 of 7 … Item 7 of 7" — step count and dot count disagree on the same board; (2) in board view the bottom sticky submit bar overlays click targets at the viewport bottom (agent-browser had to scroll elements mid-viewport to click a covered "Add note" / disclosure toggle) — z-index/scroll-padding worth a look. Both are host chrome, not pack-fixable; evidence screenshots under /tmp/getaway-qa/ (p2-01-focus-default-light.png and the Part 2 board captures).
